title: HideWindow VI
description:
Hides an Epson RC+ 8.0 window that was previously displayed with ShowWindow.

Inputs

Spel Ref
		 In	Spel reference from a previous Spel
		 Ref Out.

Error In	Error condition from a previous Spel
		 node.

Window
				 name	ID	Description

IOMonitor	1	ID for the I/O Monitor window.

TaskManager	2	ID for the Task Manager window.

ForceMonitor	3	ID for the Force Monitor window.

Simulator	4	ID for the Simulator window.

ID for the Simulator window.

Outputs

Spel Ref
		 Out	Spel reference output for next VI to
		 use.

Error Out	Error condition output for subsequent
		 Spel nodes.
